pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17.
Change groupId, artifactId, and finalName to reflect a new project identity.
Add explicit dependency for JSTL API.
Add explicit dependency for Taglibs Standard Implementation.
Set scope to provided for javax.annotation-api as it is typically provided by the container.
Add Gson library for JSON processing.
Add Log4j Core library for logging.
Explicitly configure the Maven WAR plugin version.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the bin directory to the gitignore file to exclude generated binary artifacts from version control.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update comments to reflect new slide numbers in the tutorial structure.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Changed <!-- slide 16 --> to <!-- slide 11 --> and <!-- slide 17 --> to <!-- slide 12 -->

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Add a new context parameter for admin password configuration.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Added <context-param> with param-name adminPassword and value password

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update error page locations to match the new slide directory structure.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Changed location from /s17/404.jsp to /s12/404.jsp and /s17/500.jsp to /s12/500.jsp

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Change the JNDI name of the JDBC resource reference.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Changed res-ref-name from jdbc/hr to jdbc/me

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Rename the web application display name to be more descriptive.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.human_impl: Changed display-name from My Dynamic WebApp to Java EE Servlet

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: The page title was updated to reflect the project's focus on Java EE Servlets.
A blank favicon was added to prevent 404 requests for missing icons.
An external CSS stylesheet was linked to style the page.
A base href was added to ensure relative links resolve correctly within the application context.
The navigation links were reorganized into semantic lists and updated to reflect new example paths and descriptions.
